title: a weird bow
description: This mod adds five bows to the game, namely: End Portal Bow, TNT Bow, Sun Bow, "True Hou Yi's Bow", and Teleport Bow.
body:
Bows with more functions: End Portal Bow, TNT Bow, "True Hou Yi's Bow", Sun Bow, Teleport Bow, and Dragon Slayer Bow.
 
1. TNT Bow: A bow that can shoot TNT. It can only cause damage to creatures and has no effect on blocks.
2. End Portal Bow: When the bow is shot, an activated End Portal will be generated.
3. "True Hou Yi's Bow": When shot, it will turn dark.
4. Sun Bow: When shot, it will turn bright, and it has no effect on the weather.
5. Teleport Bow: It can teleport the player to the position where the projectile lands.
6. Dragon Slayer Bow: When the player can't defeat the Ender Dragon, they can use the Dragon Slayer Bow to eliminate the dragon. The crafting recipe in the workbench can be unlocked when obtaining planks.![添加了更多功能的弓](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/528856c757bd215808da031e81e520ada5e76e9a_0.webp)
